# stop

**Instance Method**

Stops playback and rewinds to the current time of zero.

## Declaration

```swift
void stop();
```

## Discussion

After this method is called, the [doc://com.apple.livephotoskitjs/documentation/LivePhotosKitJS/LivePhotosKit.Player/currentTime] property is `0`. Like [doc://com.apple.livephotoskitjs/documentation/LivePhotosKitJS/LivePhotosKit.Player/pause], this causes [doc://com.apple.livephotoskitjs/documentation/LivePhotosKitJS/LivePhotosKit.Player/wantsToPlay] to become `false`.

## Instance Methods

- **beginFinishingPlaybackEarly**: Clips the duration of the renderer early so that the animation begins to fade back to the photo component earlier than it would ordinarily.
- **pause**: Pauses playback at the current time.
- **play**: Starts playback if the player is ready, or resumes playback if the player is paused.
- **toggle**: Starts playing the video component of Live Photo if the video is paused, or pauses the video if it is playing.
- **updateSize**: Updates the size of the player.
